violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs and various meats) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC reorganized walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Various items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Inspector observed duck tape on the inside and outside seam of the sanitizing bay of the 3 bay sink. Sink must be repaired properly. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
Hand-sink was observed in poor repair. Inspector observed a steady stream of water coming from hand-washing sink faucet in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Inspector observed a drip coming from walk-in cooler condenser piping. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair (broken/missing floor tiles w/ exposed wood). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

The walls in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Potato Salad was observed held at (54) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
Observed knives being stored between wall and 3 bay sink. PIC washed, sanitized, and stored in container Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

Beverage cooler located in the (front counter) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature observed at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
Prep Unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The condensate from the walk in cooler unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
Ceiling in dry storage area is in poor repair(observed hole) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (prepared foods) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Food contact surfaces of (ice machine) were observed with black and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
Plantains were observed in non-food grade containers. PIC informed to cease practice. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
Prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The faucet at 3 bay sink does not adequately reach all three compartments. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The wall above 3 bay sink was constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The fans in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

Inspector observed walk-in cooler wall to be separated and ceiling drooping. Inspector observed ceiling to have a hole (dry storage area). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the walk-in cooler. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
